---
title: "Hempel Foundation Internship Write Up"
author: "Sophie Pardehpoosh"
description: "Presenting my findings regarding sustainable financing options in Indonesia for Hempel Foundation internship"
date: 2026-03-10
categories: [Conservation, Research]
---

Over the summer in 2025, I was able to do an internship with the Hempel Foundation in Copenhagen, Denmark. "The Hempel Foundation is a philanthropic foundation based in Denmark, with a strong commitment to creating a brighter future for people and the planet. Rooted in the legacy of J.C. Hempel, the founder of the Hempel Group, the Foundation supports initiatives within two main focus areas: Education and Biodiversity." During my time, I was asked to research sustainable financing in Indonesia to help support decisions regarding funding and support for biodiversity conservation in Indonesia. 

<iframe src="../../files/hempel_paper.pdf" width="100%" height="800px"></iframe>
